# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Correlation-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Correlation-Id
        - X-RateLimit-Limit-Minute
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining-Minute
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      minute: 1000
      hour: 20000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false

consumers:
  - username: web-app
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: web-app-api-key

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service.internal:8080
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
            - x-api-key
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_in_body: false
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: false
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 300
          hour: 5000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
    routes:
      - name: user-service-public
        paths:
          - /api/v1/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Correlation-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 120
              hour: 2000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

  - name: admin-service
    url: http://admin-service.internal:8080
    plugins:
      - name: basic-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          hide_credentials: true
          anonymous: null
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - https://admin.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-Admin-Token
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Correlation-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 1800
          preflight_continue: false
    routes:
      - name: admin-service-api
        paths:
          - /api/v1/admin
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 60
              hour: 1000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
